var nodeMaterial = new BABYLON.NodeMaterial(" ");
nodeMaterial.mode = BABYLON.NodeMaterialModes.Material;

// InputBlock
var position = new BABYLON.InputBlock("position");
position.visibleInInspector = false;
position.visibleOnFrame = false;
position.target = 1;
position.setAsAttribute("position");

// TransformBlock
var WorldPos = new BABYLON.TransformBlock("WorldPos");
WorldPos.visibleInInspector = false;
WorldPos.visibleOnFrame = false;
WorldPos.target = 1;
WorldPos.complementZ = 0;
WorldPos.complementW = 1;

// InputBlock
var World = new BABYLON.InputBlock("World");
World.visibleInInspector = false;
World.visibleOnFrame = false;
World.target = 1;
World.setAsSystemValue(BABYLON.NodeMaterialSystemValues.World);

// TransformBlock
var WorldPosViewProjectionTransform = new BABYLON.TransformBlock("WorldPos * ViewProjectionTransform");
WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.visibleInInspector = false;
WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.visibleOnFrame = false;
WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.target = 1;
WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.complementZ = 0;
WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.complementW = 1;

// InputBlock
var ViewProjection = new BABYLON.InputBlock("ViewProjection");
ViewProjection.visibleInInspector = false;
ViewProjection.visibleOnFrame = false;
ViewProjection.target = 1;
ViewProjection.setAsSystemValue(BABYLON.NodeMaterialSystemValues.ViewProjection);

// VertexOutputBlock
var VertexOutput = new BABYLON.VertexOutputBlock("VertexOutput");
VertexOutput.visibleInInspector = false;
VertexOutput.visibleOnFrame = false;
VertexOutput.target = 1;

// InputBlock
var Color = new BABYLON.InputBlock("Color3");
Color.visibleInInspector = false;
Color.visibleOnFrame = false;
Color.target = 1;
Color.value = new BABYLON.Color3(0.9882352941176471, 0.03529411764705882, 0.30980392156862746);
Color.isConstant = false;

// LerpBlock
var Lerp = new BABYLON.LerpBlock("Lerp");
Lerp.visibleInInspector = false;
Lerp.visibleOnFrame = false;
Lerp.target = 4;

// InputBlock
var Color1 = new BABYLON.InputBlock("Color3");
Color1.visibleInInspector = false;
Color1.visibleOnFrame = false;
Color1.target = 1;
Color1.value = new BABYLON.Color3(0.5843137254901961, 0.6313725490196078, 0.8666666666666667);
Color1.isConstant = false;

// LerpBlock
var Lerp1 = new BABYLON.LerpBlock("Lerp");
Lerp1.visibleInInspector = false;
Lerp1.visibleOnFrame = false;
Lerp1.target = 4;

// TextureBlock
var Texture = new BABYLON.TextureBlock("Texture");
Texture.visibleInInspector = false;
Texture.visibleOnFrame = false;
Texture.target = 3;
Texture.convertToGammaSpace = false;
Texture.convertToLinearSpace = false;
Texture.disableLevelMultiplication = false;
Texture.texture = new BABYLON.Texture("data:octet/stream;base64,", null, false, false, 3);
Texture.texture.wrapU = 1;
Texture.texture.wrapV = 1;
Texture.texture.uAng = 0;
Texture.texture.vAng = 0;
Texture.texture.wAng = 0;
Texture.texture.uOffset = 0;
Texture.texture.vOffset = 0;
Texture.texture.uScale = 1;
Texture.texture.vScale = 1;
Texture.texture.coordinatesMode = 7;

// PannerBlock
var Panner = new BABYLON.PannerBlock("Panner");
Panner.visibleInInspector = false;
Panner.visibleOnFrame = false;
Panner.target = 4;

// AddBlock
var Add = new BABYLON.AddBlock("Add");
Add.visibleInInspector = false;
Add.visibleOnFrame = false;
Add.target = 4;

// ElbowBlock
var ElbowBlock_3579 = new BABYLON.ElbowBlock("");
ElbowBlock_3579.visibleInInspector = false;
ElbowBlock_3579.visibleOnFrame = false;
ElbowBlock_3579.target = 1;

// InputBlock
var uv = new BABYLON.InputBlock("uv");
uv.visibleInInspector = false;
uv.visibleOnFrame = false;
uv.target = 1;
uv.setAsAttribute("uv");

// PannerBlock
var Panner1 = new BABYLON.PannerBlock("Panner");
Panner1.visibleInInspector = false;
Panner1.visibleOnFrame = false;
Panner1.target = 4;

// InputBlock
var Speed_Noise = new BABYLON.InputBlock("Speed_Noise");
Speed_Noise.visibleInInspector = false;
Speed_Noise.visibleOnFrame = true;
Speed_Noise.target = 1;
Speed_Noise.value = new BABYLON.Vector2(0, 1);
Speed_Noise.isConstant = false;

// InputBlock
var time = new BABYLON.InputBlock("time");
time.visibleInInspector = false;
time.visibleOnFrame = false;
time.target = 1;
time.value = 0;
time.min = 0;
time.max = 0;
time.isBoolean = false;
time.matrixMode = 0;
time.animationType = BABYLON.AnimatedInputBlockTypes.Time;
time.isConstant = false;

// TextureBlock
var Texture1 = new BABYLON.TextureBlock("Texture");
Texture1.visibleInInspector = false;
Texture1.visibleOnFrame = false;
Texture1.target = 3;
Texture1.convertToGammaSpace = false;
Texture1.convertToLinearSpace = false;
Texture1.disableLevelMultiplication = false;
Texture1.texture = new BABYLON.Texture("data:octet/stream;base64,", null, false, false, 3);
Texture1.texture.wrapU = 1;
Texture1.texture.wrapV = 1;
Texture1.texture.uAng = 0;
Texture1.texture.vAng = 0;
Texture1.texture.wAng = 0;
Texture1.texture.uOffset = 0;
Texture1.texture.vOffset = 0;
Texture1.texture.uScale = 1;
Texture1.texture.vScale = 1;
Texture1.texture.coordinatesMode = 7;

// ImageSourceBlock
var ImageSourceBlock = new BABYLON.ImageSourceBlock("ImageSourceBlock");
ImageSourceBlock.visibleInInspector = false;
ImageSourceBlock.visibleOnFrame = false;
ImageSourceBlock.target = 3;
ImageSourceBlock.texture = new BABYLON.Texture("data:octet/stream;base64,", null, false, false, 3);
ImageSourceBlock.texture.wrapU = 1;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.wrapV = 1;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.uAng = 0;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.vAng = 0;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.wAng = 0;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.uOffset = 0;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.vOffset = 0;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.uScale = 1;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.vScale = 1;
ImageSourceBlock.texture.coordinatesMode = 7;

// ElbowBlock
var ElbowBlock_3582 = new BABYLON.ElbowBlock("");
ElbowBlock_3582.visibleInInspector = false;
ElbowBlock_3582.visibleOnFrame = false;
ElbowBlock_3582.target = 4;

// MultiplyBlock
var Multiply = new BABYLON.MultiplyBlock("Multiply");
Multiply.visibleInInspector = false;
Multiply.visibleOnFrame = false;
Multiply.target = 4;

// InputBlock
var Distortion = new BABYLON.InputBlock("Distortion");
Distortion.visibleInInspector = false;
Distortion.visibleOnFrame = false;
Distortion.target = 1;
Distortion.value = new BABYLON.Vector2(0.01, 0);
Distortion.isConstant = false;

// InputBlock
var Speed = new BABYLON.InputBlock("Speed");
Speed.visibleInInspector = false;
Speed.visibleOnFrame = false;
Speed.target = 1;
Speed.value = new BABYLON.Vector2(-0.2, 0);
Speed.isConstant = false;

// InputBlock
var time1 = new BABYLON.InputBlock("time");
time1.visibleInInspector = false;
time1.visibleOnFrame = false;
time1.target = 1;
time1.value = 0;
time1.min = 0;
time1.max = 0;
time1.isBoolean = false;
time1.matrixMode = 0;
time1.animationType = BABYLON.AnimatedInputBlockTypes.Time;
time1.isConstant = false;

// FragmentOutputBlock
var FragmentOutput = new BABYLON.FragmentOutputBlock("FragmentOutput");
FragmentOutput.visibleInInspector = false;
FragmentOutput.visibleOnFrame = false;
FragmentOutput.target = 2;
FragmentOutput.convertToGammaSpace = false;
FragmentOutput.convertToLinearSpace = false;
FragmentOutput.useLogarithmicDepth = false;

// ElbowBlock
var ElbowBlock_3565 = new BABYLON.ElbowBlock("");
ElbowBlock_3565.visibleInInspector = false;
ElbowBlock_3565.visibleOnFrame = false;
ElbowBlock_3565.target = 4;

// Connections
position.output.connectTo(WorldPos.vector);
World.output.connectTo(WorldPos.transform);
WorldPos.output.connectTo(WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.vector);
ViewProjection.output.connectTo(WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.transform);
WorldPosViewProjectionTransform.output.connectTo(VertexOutput.vector);
Color.output.connectTo(Lerp.left);
Color1.output.connectTo(Lerp.right);
uv.output.connectTo(Panner1.uv);
Speed_Noise.output.connectTo(Panner1.speed);
time.output.connectTo(Panner1.time);
Panner1.output.connectTo(Texture1.uv);
ImageSourceBlock.source.connectTo(Texture1.source);
Texture1.g.connectTo(Lerp.gradient);
Lerp.output.connectTo(ElbowBlock_3565.input);
ElbowBlock_3565.output.connectTo(FragmentOutput.rgb);
uv.output.connectTo(ElbowBlock_3579.input);
ElbowBlock_3579.output.connectTo(Add.left);
Distortion.output.connectTo(Multiply.left);
Texture1.g.connectTo(ElbowBlock_3582.input);
ElbowBlock_3582.output.connectTo(Multiply.right);
Multiply.output.connectTo(Add.right);
Add.output.connectTo(Panner.uv);
Speed.output.connectTo(Panner.speed);
time1.output.connectTo(Panner.time);
Panner.output.connectTo(Texture.uv);
ImageSourceBlock.source.connectTo(Texture.source);
Texture.r.connectTo(FragmentOutput.a);

// Output nodes
nodeMaterial.addOutputNode(VertexOutput);
nodeMaterial.addOutputNode(FragmentOutput);
nodeMaterial.build();
